title: Spectraplast 2X 14L Black Builders Bucket – Heavy Duty 3 Gallon Buckets for Garden, Household & Construction | Mortar Mixing, Tool Storage, Water Carrying, Cleaning & Outdoor Jobs Metal Handle
features: GREAT VALUE PACK OF 2 – Get two heavy-duty 14 Litre (3 Gallon) black builders buckets from Spectraplast – perfect for professionals, tradespeople, and homeowners needing reliable buckets for multiple jobs.
MULTIPURPOSE USE – Ideal for mixing mortar, cement, plaster, or paint, and for carrying tools, water, sand, garden waste, compost, or other materials around the home or job site.
STRONG & DURABLE – Built from premium high-density plastic (HDPE) for exceptional strength, impact resistance, and long-lasting performance in all weather conditions.
PERFECT FOR GARDEN & HOUSEHOLD TASKS – Great for watering plants, cleaning, composting, DIY projects, soil mixing, and other everyday tasks in the garden or home.
COMFORTABLE CARRY HANDLE – Fitted with a sturdy metal handle and plastic grip for secure and comfortable lifting, even when fully loaded.
EASY TO CLEAN – Smooth inner surfaces prevent material build-up and make cleaning quick and simple after each use.
TRUSTED UK BRAND – Designed by Spectraplast, specialists in heavy-duty buckets and tubs, trusted by builders, gardeners, and homeowners across the UK.
description: Spectraplast 14 Litre Black Builders Bucket – Pack of 2 | Heavy Duty 3 Gallon Buckets for Garden, Household & Construction Jobs Introducing the Spectraplast Pack of 2 Heavy-Duty Builders Buckets – the perfect solution for those who need not just one, but two reliable, tough, and multi-purpose buckets. Whether you are a professional builder, a passionate gardener, or a homeowner looking for a practical solution for household chores, this twin pack offers the perfect balance of quality, durability, and value. Why Choose the Spectraplast Pack of 2 Builders Buckets? Our buckets are made from high-grade, impact-resistant HDPE plastic designed to withstand demanding conditions in construction sites, gardens, and households. This twin pack means you can keep one for clean jobs and one for heavy-duty tasks, or use them simultaneously to save time and effort. Top Features: 14 Litre Capacity: Each bucket holds up to 14 litres (3 gallons), giving you plenty of room for large or small tasks. Heavy-Duty Build: Tough enough for cement mixing, gravel hauling, and water carrying. Comfort Grip Handle: Metal handle with ergonomic plastic grip for easy lifting. Multipurpose: Suitable for construction, gardening, DIY projects, and cleaning. Easy to Clean: Smooth interior walls make washing out quick and simple. Long-Lasting: UV and weather-resistant for extended outdoor use. Perfect for Builders Designed with tradespeople in mind, our buckets are ideal for mixing mortar, cement, plaster, or paint , as well as transporting tools, sand, and aggregates. The sturdy plastic construction ensures that these buckets can handle heavy loads without cracking or warping, making them a must-have for any building site. Perfect for Gardeners Whether you need to carry soil, mix compost, water plants, or collect garden waste, these buckets are an essential garden tool. With two buckets in the pack, you can use one for clean water and another for soil or compost, keeping tasks organised and efficient. Perfect for Household Tasks From mopping floors to washing the car, having two buckets at hand makes many household chores faster and easier. One bucket can be dedicated to cleaning solutions while the other is for rinsing water, helping you work more hygienically and effectively. Built to Last Unlike cheap, flimsy buckets, the Spectraplast 14L Builders Bucket is crafted from premium plastic designed for years of use. The robust metal handle with a comfortable plastic grip ensures safe handling, even when carrying heavy loads. Specifications: Brand: Spectraplast Pack Size: 2 Buckets Capacity: 14 Litres (3 Gallons) Each Colour: Black Material: High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) Handle: Metal with Plastic Grip Dimensions: Approx. 32cm (Diameter) x 27cm (Height) per bucket Popular Uses: Mixing mortar, cement, or plaster Transporting sand, gravel, or aggregates Carrying water for construction or gardening Garden soil, compost, or waste collection DIY home renovation projects Cleaning and washing applications Camping, fishing, and outdoor activities Why Spectraplast? Spectraplast is a trusted UK brand known for producing tough, long-lasting household and trade products. Our commitment to quality means every bucket we sell is designed to deliver exceptional performance, whether it’s used daily on a construction site or occasionally in the garden. Order Your Pack of 2 Spectraplast Builders Buckets Today Make your jobs easier, faster, and more efficient with a twin pack of Spectraplast 14L Builders Buckets . Get the durability you need and the value you deserve. Click “Add to Basket” now and experience the strength, capacity, and versatility of Spectraplast buckets!
